name: Pudge
description: When I'm through with these vermin, they'll be fit for a pie! Pudge, the Butcher Disables the unit-targeted enemy, and deals damage over time based on Pudge's current.

abilities.name: Flesh Heap
abilities.description: Grants bonus whenever Pudge kills an enemy hero or when an enemy hero dies within his vicinity. Grants Pudge a stack if the enemy hero kill is credited to him, regardless of distance.

abilities.name: Meat Hook
abilities.description: Launches a bloody hook toward a unit or location. The hook will snag the first unit it encounters, dragging the unit back to Pudge and dealing damage. Deals additional damage to the hooked enemy unit corresponding to the dragged distance.

abilities.name: Rot
abilities.description: A toxic cloud that deals intense damage and slows movement — harming not only enemy units but Pudge himself.

abilities.name: Meat Shield
abilities.description: Negates all damage types from all sources while active.

abilities.name: Dismember
abilities.description: Chows down and pulls the unit-targeted enemy up to a certain minimum distance. Disables the unit-targeted enemy, and deals damage over time based on Pudge's current.
